RetrievalEvent.query:
A contraction mapping on a complete metric space has a unique fixed point. ∀ {α : Type*} [MetricSpace α] [CompleteSpace α] [Nonempty α] {f : α → α}, IsContraction f → ∃! x, Function.IsFixedPt f x α✝ : Type u_1
inst✝² : MetricSpace α✝
inst✝¹ : CompleteSpace α✝
inst✝ : Nonempty α✝
f✝ : α✝ → α✝
a✝ : IsContraction f✝
⊢ ∃! x, Function.IsFixedPt f✝ x

retrieved_premises.name: ContractingWith.fixedPoint_isFixedPt
retrieved_premises.statement:
∀ {α : Type u_1} [inst : MetricSpace α] {K : NNReal} {f : α → α} (hf : ContractingWith K f) [inst_1 : Nonempty α]
  [inst_2 : CompleteSpace α], Function.IsFixedPt f (ContractingWith.fixedPoint f hf)

retrieved_premises.name: ContractingWith.efixedPoint_isFixedPt
retrieved_premises.statement:
∀ {α : Type u_1} [inst : EMetricSpace α] {K : NNReal} {f : α → α} [inst_1 : CompleteSpace α] (hf : ContractingWith K f)
  {x : α} (hx : edist x (f x) ≠ ⊤), Function.IsFixedPt f (ContractingWith.efixedPoint f hf x hx)

retrieved_premises.name: ContractingWith.fixedPoint_unique
retrieved_premises.statement:
∀ {α : Type u_1} [inst : MetricSpace α] {K : NNReal} {f : α → α} (hf : ContractingWith K f) [inst_1 : Nonempty α]
  [inst_2 : CompleteSpace α] {x : α}, Function.IsFixedPt f x → x = ContractingWith.fixedPoint f hf

retrieved_premises.name: ContractingWith.fixedPoint_unique'
retrieved_premises.statement:
∀ {α : Type u_1} [inst : MetricSpace α] {K : NNReal} {f : α → α},
  ContractingWith K f → ∀ {x y : α}, Function.IsFixedPt f x → Function.IsFixedPt f y → x = y

retrieved_premises.name: ContractingWith.exists_fixedPoint'
retrieved_premises.statement:
∀ {α : Type u_1} [inst : EMetricSpace α] {K : NNReal} {f : α → α} {s : Set α},
  IsComplete s →
    ∀ (hsf : Set.MapsTo f s s),
      ContractingWith K (Set.MapsTo.restrict f s s hsf) →
        ∀ {x : α},
          x ∈ s →
            edist x (f x) ≠ ⊤ →
              ∃ y ∈ s,
                Function.IsFixedPt f y ∧
                  Filter.Tendsto (fun n => f^[n] x) Filter.atTop (nhds y) ∧
                    ∀ (n : ℕ), edist (f^[n] x) y ≤ edist x (f x) * ↑K ^ n / (1 - ↑K)
